name: lsdir
documentation:
# Directory Listing

`lsdir` will recursively list a directory and its subdirectories. For text
files, the contents will also be listed. These entire contents are written
to stdout.

## Installation

Installation can be done using `homebrew` with the following commands:

```bash
brew tap sodium-hydroxide/lsdir https://github.com/sodium-hydroxide/lsdir
brew install sodium-hydroxide/lsdir/lsdir
```

## Usage

```bash
lsdir --help
```

functions.name: lsdir.lsdir.write_to_clipboard
documentation:
Attempt to write data to system clipboard.
Supports Windows, macOS, and various Linux clipboard managers.
Returns True if successful, False otherwise.

functions.name: lsdir.lsdir.get_file_details
documentation: Get detailed file information similar to ls -la

functions.name: lsdir.lsdir.is_binary
documentation: Use python-magic to check if a file is binary

functions.name: lsdir.lsdir.process_directory
documentation: Process a directory and its subdirectories
